svg.text: qoala-mlir docs · Operations reference / QoalaHost, Architecture / IRs

div.p: A qoalahost.main_func rectangle containing a vertical sequence of blocks (^bb0, ^bb1, ^bb2, …). Each block:

ul.li: Starts with a qoalahost.blk_meta annotation showing its block_id and predecessors.
Contains the block's payload: one of (a) a single qoalahost.call @routine(...), (b) a single qoalahost.recv_int/recv_*, or (c) a sequence of arith/memref ops terminated by qoalahost.nop_term.

div.p: Show one separate netqasm.local_routine @routine box being called from a CL block. Highlight how qoalahost-add-block-precedences populates the predecessors list, and how qoalahost-reorder-blocks swaps two blocks (use a small "before / after" mini-diagram in a corner) to shorten qubit lifetime.
